translations.en: an old farmer who looks to have has made his peace with life.
translations.zh: 一位老農夫，神情顯示他已與生命和解。

translations.en: "Working the earth is the lowest form 'o labor."
"But it provides food for them as writes books, plays music, and other such things."
translations.zh: 「但它為那些寫書、奏樂以及諸如此類之人提供了糧食。」

translations.en: "Surely 'tis a humble living, to devote yer life to farmin'."
translations.zh: 「將一生奉獻給耕種，確是謙遜的生計。」

translations.en: "It's about all I do with meself, 'cept when I find time for carvin' @hippos."
translations.zh: 「這幾乎是我的全部，除了偶爾有空雕刻@河馬。」

translations.en: The old man gets a fiendish gleam in his eyes as he reaches into his pouch and takes out a small wooden hippo.
translations.zh: 老人眼中閃過一絲惡作劇的光芒，他伸手入袋，取出一個小木雕河馬。

translations.en: "If I don't make the purtiest gol' danged hippos you ever did see, you can call me @Mortimer."
translations.zh: 「若我雕的河馬不是汝見過最美的，就叫我@莫提默吧。」

translator_notes: 093 William: 新馬精西亞老農夫，謙遜美德體現者，愛好雕刻木河馬。鄉村口音以平易語氣表現。
